name: cde-storage
title: Storage Footprint & Capacity
description: CDE-authored — storage TB by source, structured-vs-unstructured & object-size distribution over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: TbBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TbByRestype
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.resource_type,''),'(unknown)') AS rt, ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SizeDist
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT band, count(*) AS assets FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN s.bytes<1e9 THEN '1. <1 GB' WHEN s.bytes<1e10 THEN '2. 1-10 GB' WHEN s.bytes<1e11 THEN '3. 10-100 GB' WHEN s.bytes<1e12 THEN '4. 100GB-1TB' ELSE '5. 1 TB+' END AS band FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE')) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
